name: PSA OpenSTAT PXWeb API
coverage: Philippines with national, regional, and selected city/HUC breakdowns including NCR
access_method: PXWeb REST API with table metadata and POST queries
rate_limits: OpenSTAT docs state 10 requests per 10 seconds; direct API should be throttled
last_updated_signal: API live on 2026-07-03; table-level freshness varies by domain
metro_manila_filter_method: Use table-specific geolocation dimensions for National Capital Region, NCR PSGC, or city/HUC rows
license_or_terms: OpenSTAT states open reuse with source attribution; PSA pages say content is public domain unless otherwise stated
risks: Table IDs and value codes must be discovered from metadata; documentation pages may block plain curl even when API endpoints work
notes: Local live checks returned HTTP 200 for the PXWeb DB index and population table metadata.

name: PSGC GitLab API mirror
owner: Community mirror based on PSA PSGC data
coverage: Philippine regions, provinces, cities, municipalities, sub-municipalities, and barangays
rate_limits: Static hosting limits only; no published API quota
last_updated_signal: API docs show current data as of June 30, 2022; NCR endpoint live on 2026-07-03
metro_manila_filter_method: Use NCR region code 130000000; example endpoint /regions/130000000/barangays.json
license_or_terms: Mirror project terms; source data from PSA PSGC
risks: Mirror may lag official PSGC; use official PSA publication/API for formal reporting
notes: Local live check returned HTTP 200 and a 452 KB NCR barangay JSON payload.

name: HDX Philippines COD-AB
owner: OCHA / Humanitarian Data Exchange, with PSA/NAMRIA-derived boundary sources
data_type: boundary downloads and CKAN package metadata
access_method: HDX CKAN Action API plus resource downloads
rate_limits: Not published; use CKAN pagination and polite download behavior
last_updated_signal: Package API returned resources and current metadata on 2026-07-03
metro_manila_filter_method: Filter admin records by NCR name or P-code such as PH13
license_or_terms: Dataset-specific HDX license; verify resource metadata before redistribution
risks: Countrywide files can be large; boundary vintages and source lineage should be noted in analysis
notes: Local live check returned HTTP 200 and resource URLs for GeoJSON, SHP, GDB, and XLSX.

name: MMDA Metro Manila City/Municipality Boundary FeatureServer
owner: Metro Manila GIS Database Project / MMDA ArcGIS organization
access_method: ArcGIS REST layer metadata and query endpoints
last_updated_signal: Layer metadata and count endpoint live on 2026-07-03
metro_manila_filter_method: Already NCR-scoped; use CityMunicipality and CityMunicipalityPSGC fields
license_or_terms: Layer-level license not clearly stated; check ArcGIS item metadata before redistribution
risks: ArcGIS item permissions can change; license fields may be blank
notes: Local live check returned count 17 and fields including RegionPSGC and CityMunicipalityPSGC.

name: MMDA ArcGIS FeatureServices
owner: Metro Manila GIS Database Project / MMDA ArcGIS organization
coverage: Metro Manila public GIS layers including schools, rivers, flood-prone areas, and establishments
access_method: ArcGIS Online Sharing REST search and item-level query endpoints
rate_limits: Feature service maxRecordCount applies per layer
last_updated_signal: ArcGIS org search returned 27 public Feature/Map services on 2026-07-03
metro_manila_filter_method: Many layers are NCR-scoped; otherwise query city fields such as CityMunic, CITY_MUNIC, or LGU
risks: Some layers may be test/noisy or underdocumented; validate feature quality before using in production
notes: Local live check returned 2,747 features for MM_Schools.

name: BetterGov Open Data Portal API
last_updated_signal: Subagent live check found /api/v1/stats returning 23 datasets and 432 resources
metro_manila_filter_method: Search tags/descriptions for NCR, Metro Manila, barangay, city names, and PSGC codes
license_or_terms: Project README states CC0; verify primary source attribution per dataset
risks: Community-run; `/api/3/action` CKAN path returned 404 locally, so use documented v1 endpoints
notes: Local CKAN-style check returned 404, confirming this should be treated as its own API, not CKAN.

name: Geofabrik Philippines OSM Extracts
data_type: bulk OSM road, POI, landuse, and feature data
rate_limits: No formal quota published; use polite bulk-download behavior
last_updated_signal: Page live on 2026-07-03; subagents observed same-day extract timestamps
metro_manila_filter_method: Clip national extract to NCR bbox/admin boundary and filter OSM tags
risks: Large files; ODbL attribution/share-alike obligations; community completeness varies
notes: Local live check returned HTTP 200 for the Geofabrik Philippines page.

name: OpenStreetMap Overpass API
coverage: Global OSM data, filterable to Metro Manila
rate_limits: Public guidance asks light usage; agents cited about 10,000 requests/day and below 1 GB/day
last_updated_signal: Agents observed current OSM base timestamps on 2026-07-03
metro_manila_filter_method: Use NCR bbox or OSM area relation and filter tags such as shop, amenity, office, highway
license_or_terms: OSM data under ODbL; Overpass software under AGPL
risks: Local initial queries returned 406 due request formatting; public Overpass is not for heavy commercial backend loads
notes: Use Geofabrik for heavy repeated extraction; use Overpass for targeted live queries.

name: TUMI Datahub Manila GTFS
owner: TUMI Datahub; data collected with Manila transport agencies/operators
access_method: CKAN resource page and direct ZIP download
last_updated_signal: Agent found data and metadata last updated February 6, 2025
metro_manila_filter_method: Use GTFS stops/routes inside NCR bbox or agency/route names
license_or_terms: Resource page indicates Creative Commons Attribution but warns license info may be outdated
risks: Download was slow/timed out in checks; validate ZIP before pipeline use
notes: Good transit feed candidate, but should be verified with unzip/GTFS validation before automated use.

name: PhilGEPS public procurement endpoints
coverage: Philippine public procurement, filterable to NCR agencies and suppliers
auth_required: No for public endpoints tested by agent
last_updated_signal: Agent live check returned bid data by year
metro_manila_filter_method: Filter agency/supplier names and locations for NCR city strings
license_or_terms: Site terms apply; official portal warns data is client-provided
risks: Endpoint stability undocumented; source should be rechecked before scheduled use
notes: Good market-proxy source, but not as cleanly documented as PSA/ArcGIS/CKAN APIs.

name: Santos Knight Frank WordPress market report API
access_method: WordPress REST API search plus PDF downloads
last_updated_signal: Agent found Q1 2026 report metadata and PDF Last-Modified June 2, 2026
metro_manila_filter_method: Search report titles for Metro Manila and submarket terms
license_or_terms: Commercial website/report copyright; cite and do not redistribute full reports without permission
risks: Metrics are PDF/manual extraction, not normalized data; potential commercial-research bias
notes: Useful as a market-proxy index, not a clean open-data source.

name: Open Data Philippines portal/API
access_method: SPA portal and gated public API host
auth_required: API appears to require key; portal browsing is public
metro_manila_filter_method: Search portal/API for NCR, Metro Manila, agency, and city names
license_or_terms: ODPH says datasets are generally free unless metadata states otherwise
risks: Not CKAN-compatible at /api/3/action; API key required should not be bypassed
notes: Local `/api/3/action/package_search` check returned the SPA HTML, not CKAN JSON.

name: QC Open Data Dashboard
last_updated_signal: Page live on 2026-07-03; page states datasets from 2019 onward
metro_manila_filter_method: QC-only; use dashboard program categories after authorized login
license_or_terms: QC website terms/privacy; dataset license not stated
risks: Not no-auth open data; do not automate login or scrape without permission
notes: Useful lead, but not part of the first no-auth machine-readable ingestion tier.

name: GeoRiskPH PSA Barangay Boundary MapServer
rate_limits: Layer metadata cited maxRecordCount=20000 in agent finding
last_updated_signal: Indicative boundaries observed at end of June 2016; local check returned 503
metro_manila_filter_method: Query NCR region fields or PSGC prefix
risks: Older boundary vintage and temporary service unavailability; use HDX/MMDA/PSGC first
notes: Local live check returned HTTP 503; keep as monitored fallback.

name: BSP Physical Network / Financial Service Access Points
coverage: Philippine banking offices and financial service access points
data_type: financial access statistics and table-backed web pages
access_method: BSP web pages, SharePoint-backed tables, and Excel links where exposed
last_updated_signal: BSP page returned HTTP 200 locally on 2026-07-03
metro_manila_filter_method: Filter workbook/table rows for National Capital Region and NCR cities
risks: Direct XLS/resource links may be hidden behind SharePoint scripts; requires careful terms-compliant extraction
notes: Static HTML exposed SharePoint list references and DataTables export configuration, but not a clean public API.
